name: Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings Inc. Warrants
summary: Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings Inc. Warrants is a warrant to purchase shares of Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings Inc., a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for cancer. These warrants grant the holder the right to purchase Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings Inc. common stock at a specified price in the future. Warrants are often issued in conjunction with an IPO or other financing.
